forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not add ungated near-ground reward that favors low_progress_survival
required_changes: restructure terminal_penalty to penalize low_progress_survival more than partial_progress or avoid penalizing partial_progress that shows progress
gate low_alt_stability by pad proximity and leg contact to reward only trajectories that are near the landing pad
make leg_bonus and terminal_bonus attainable for partial_progress with softer conditioning (e.g., lower thresholds on velocity and angle)
ensure net reward on partial_progress is strictly higher than on low_progress_survival

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
